mapper.select:
SELECT member_id AS memberId, point, game_count AS gameCount, hide_num AS hideNum, game_act_flg AS gameActFlg, rec_create_date as recCreateDate, rec_update_date as recUpdateDate
FROM POINTINFO WHERE member_id = #{memberId}

SELECT member_id as memberId, game_count as gameCount, input_num as inputNum, result, game_date as gameDate FROM RESULTINFO WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND game_date = CURRENT_DATE ORDER BY game_count ASC
